parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'product e industry son requeridos', status: 'error' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO campaigns (name, product_or_service, industry, duration_days, start_date, end_date, target_audience, tone, language, cta_whatsapp, platforms, content_mix, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_DATE + $4 * INTERVAL '1 day', $5, $6, 'es-MX', $7, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, 'generating') RETURNING id, name

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'Eres un experto en marketing digital para el mercado mexicano. Genera un calendario de contenido de ' + ($('Webhook').first().json.body.duration_days || 30) + ' dias para:

Producto/Servicio: ' + $('Webhook').first().json.body.product + '
Industria: ' + $('Webhook').first().json.body.industry + '
Audiencia objetivo: ' + ($('Webhook').first().json.body.target_audience || 'Publico general en Mexico') + '
Tono: ' + ($('Webhook').first().json.body.tone || 'profesional') + '
CTA WhatsApp: ' + ($('Webhook').first().json.body.cta_whatsapp || 'wa.me/526671326265') + '

REGLAS:
- Mix de contenido: 40% educativo, 30% promocional, 20% social proof, 10% behind the scenes
- Horarios optimos Mexico (CST): L-V 9-10am, 1-2pm, 7-8pm / Sabado 10-11am
- Todo en espanol mexicano natural
- CTAs siempre con enlace de WhatsApp
- Hashtags relevantes al nicho (5-10 por post)
- Cada post debe tener un image_prompt descriptivo en ingles para generar imagen con AI

Respunde SOLO con un JSON array valido (sin markdown, sin ```), cada elemento con esta estructura exacta:
{"day": 1, "type": "educativo|promocional|social_proof|behind_scenes", "time": "10:00", "caption": "texto del post en espanol", "caption_x": "version corta 280 chars max", "hashtags": ["tag1", "tag2"], "image_prompt": "descriptive prompt in English for AI image generation"}' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.8, maxOutputTokens: 8192, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ instances: [{ prompt: $json.image_prompt }], parameters: { sampleCount: 1, aspectRatio: '1:1', personGeneration: 'DONT_ALLOW' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ platforms: $json.platforms, content: $json.caption, media: $json.image_base64 ? [{ type: 'image', data: $json.image_base64 }] : [], scheduled_at: $json.scheduled_datetime }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO campaign_posts (campaign_id, day_number, post_type, caption, caption_x, image_prompt, platforms, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, blotato_post_id, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7::jsonb, $8::date, $9::time, $10, 'scheduled')
UPDATE campaigns SET status = 'active', total_posts = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaign_posts WHERE campaign_id = $1) WHERE id = $1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', campaign_id: $('Create Campaign Record').first().json.id, message: 'Campana generada y programada exitosamente', total_posts: $json.total_posts || 30 }) }}
